academicResearch.title: Graph Neural Networks for Automated Threat Categorization
academicResearch.researchGroup: University of Arizona Cybersecurity Research Lab
academicResearch.description: Cost-effective ML pipeline optimization reducing processing costs 89% through Graph Neural Network implementations for automated threat categorization at 40M+ URL scale.

academicResearch.title: Advanced NL2KQL Pipeline for Security Automation
